note: SYNTHETIC placeholder calendar — actions to be co-drafted with NDC / provincial DALs.

actions.action: Pre-position kaukau vine cuttings of frost-hardy varieties at ward level
Community frost-watch rosters; clear night SMS alerts to ward recorders
Open high-altitude food barter routes with lowland wards; subsidise transport
Distribute quick-maturing vegetable seed for valley-floor replanting
Cash-for-work on water storage before the dry deepens
Stage drought-and-frost awareness through church and haus krai networks
Pre-position water containers and purification at aid posts
Frost-watch and mulching drives in gardens above 2,000 m
actions.trigger: First frost report in neighbouring Enga

actions.action: School feeding contingency for high-valley communities
Dredge-clear community water points along the middle Fly
actions.trigger: Fly River gauge below seasonal 25th percentile

actions.action: Pre-position sago supplies and fuel for river ambulances
Rainwater tank checks at schools and aid posts; ration plans
Riverine food-relief corridors agreed with churches and OTML
Map gardens above 2,200 m ward by ward; identify frost-exposed households
Vine multiplication plots at mission stations for rapid replanting
Night-temperature watch; radio frost warnings in Tok Ples
